scope.summary: Splits the CI lane health dashboard panel out of App.tsx as a presentation-only seam while preserving App.tsx re-export compatibility.
out_of_scope: No new network calls or operator-client fetch paths.
No pairing, CSRF, action-ticket, credential, authentication, or one-time-code logic was moved or edited.
No rendered-output redesign; the moved JSX and CI lane health test contract remain isomorphic.

entry_points.name: source commit
entry_points.trace: `git show --stat 1a2125017dd09e9569853d0d6c68f3b8352f9785` showed a three-path source commit: web/src/app/App.tsx, web/src/app/ci-lane-health-panel.tsx, and scripts/oraclemcp_arch_fitness_lint.sh.

entry_points.name: CI lane health render contract
entry_points.trace: `cd web && npx vitest run src/app/ci-lane-health.test.tsx` exited 0 with 1 file passed and 6 tests passed. The test still imports CiLaneHealthPanel from ./App, proving the App.tsx facade re-export remains compatible.

entry_points.name: App.tsx ratchet proof
entry_points.trace: `wc -l web/src/app/App.tsx` reported 9708 lines, and the ratchet entry in scripts/oraclemcp_arch_fitness_lint.sh is [web/src/app/App.tsx]=9708; the shell comparison `test "$app_lines" -le "$limit"` exited 0.

entry_points.name: security-sensitive seam scope check
entry_points.trace: `rg -n 'pair|csrf|ticket|one-time|fetch|operator/v1|EventSource|credential|auth|POST|form|code' web/src/app/ci-lane-health-panel.tsx -i` found only CI health/status/formatting substrings such as posture, freshness, timestamp, and formatNumber; it found no pairing, CSRF, ticket, credential, auth, one-time code, operator endpoint, EventSource, POST, or fetch implementation.

entry_points.name: close scaffold scope cleanliness
entry_points.trace: `python3 scripts/audit_bead_closes.py --template oraclemcp-eng-program-bp8ia.4.6.3 --scope web/src/app/App.tsx --scope web/src/app/ci-lane-health-panel.tsx --scope scripts/oraclemcp_arch_fitness_lint.sh` reported source sha 1a2125017dd09e9569853d0d6c68f3b8352f9785 with tree_clean true for the claimed scope.

limitations: Full `bash scripts/oraclemcp_arch_fitness_lint.sh` is not used as close evidence because the shared checkout is currently red outside this bead: crates/oraclemcp/src/dispatch/tests.rs has 15703 lines over its 15676 ratchet. The App.tsx ratchet was checked directly and is green.

The first Vitest attempt was run from the repository root and incorrectly collected copied tests under target/ and .claude/worktrees; the valid proof reran from web/ and passed only the real package test.
